items.title: Cross-Validatory Choice and Assessment of Statistical Predictions (Stone, 1974)
items.author: M. Stone
items.note: Foundational cross-validation framework for predictive assessment.

items.title: scikit-learn: Cross-validation evaluators
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Reference for KFold, StratifiedKFold, cross_val_score, and nested CV patterns.

items.title: Nested Cross-Validation for Model Selection (Varma & Simon, 2006)
items.author: Rajinder Varma, Richard Simon
items.note: Explains inner vs outer CV loops to avoid optimistic bias when tuning and evaluating.
